---
title: "Marin Girard"
title-block: false
---

::: {.home-hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
<div class="eyebrow">Quantum foundations · Quantum information · Emergence</div>

::: {.hero-intro}
I study how classical objectivity and spacetime emerge from quantum information.
:::

I am a PhD student in physics at Virginia Tech working on quantum foundations and quantum error correction, with an emphasis on the conceptual structure behind classicality, subsystems, and spacetime.

This site brings together my current research directions, selected papers, and CV.

::: {.trust-links}
[Google Scholar](#) · [ORCID](#) · [Email](mailto:youremail@vt.edu)
:::

::: {.hero-actions}
[Research](research.qmd){.hero-button}
[Publications](publications.qmd){.hero-button .hero-button-secondary}
[CV](cv.pdf){.hero-button .hero-button-secondary}
:::
:::

![](assets/profile-photo.jpg){.hero-photo}
:::

::: {.section-card-grid}
::: {.section-card}
## Research

Questions about objectivity, subsystem structure, and the emergence of spacetime from quantum information.

[View research themes](research.qmd)
:::

::: {.section-card}
## Publications

Selected papers with brief summaries and a visual preview for each project.

[Browse papers](publications.qmd)
:::
:::
